subject: Paid invoice but downgraded to Trial/Read-only; seats dropped from 50 to 5

messages.text: We paid invoice INV-94812 for the seat true-up. Stripe shows it as paid. But the product reverted us to Trial/Read-only and removed seats (we need 50). This happened this morning. Please fix today.
Thanks—I'm investigating billing + entitlements sync. Can you confirm if exports are locked for all datasets or only a specific one?
Exports are locked generally, but even when unlocked we still get 'export restricted' for dataset D-938. Also, teammate (alex@acmecorp.example) can't accept invite because it says no seats available.

Billing account BA-ACME-001 still marked past_due (dunning stage_1) even though INV-94812 is paid. Entitlements gating uses billing_account.status; fallback applied at 08:22 (exports + api disabled; seats.max=5). Suspect delayed reconciliation for INV-94700. Need: (1) reconcile billing account, (2) resync entitlements, (3) reconcile seat provisioning, (4) explain dataset D-938 export restriction (policy).
We found a mismatch where billing is paid but entitlements still reflect a 'past_due' gate. We will resync your entitlements and seat allocation, and follow up with a detailed timeline.

subject: Paid but downgraded again; seats reverted to 5

messages.text: We just paid our invoice (INV-95001) and Stripe shows success. Our workspace was downgraded to Trial/Read-only and seats went from 20 to 5. Same kind of issue we had before—please check billing vs entitlements sync.
